_meta.explanation: The connected Ecwid MCP server exposes only: check_token_scopes, get_store_profile, list_categories, list_products, get_product, search_products, backup_catalogue (read) + update_product, upload_product_image (write, NOT used). There is NO MCP tool to list or read Ecwid Instant Site static pages (About/Terms/Privacy/Shipping/FAQ). Their HTML content could not be pulled via the API. The task's strict read-only mode forbids browser scraping, so page BODIES are not captured here. Only the known public URLs (from the prior 2026-05-28 storefront audit) are listed below so the Next.js build knows which routes Ecwid owns and must NOT be overlapped.

knownStaticPages_fromPriorStorefrontAudi.name: Blog
knownStaticPages_fromPriorStorefrontAudi.note: Blog is modeled as Ecwid categories under root 168032038 (see 01-categories.json). Article bodies not retrievable via MCP.

recommendation: To capture static-page bodies for the Next.js build, either (a) copy them from the Ecwid admin (Instant Site > Pages), or (b) run a one-off rendered fetch OUTSIDE this read-only task. Do NOT recreate these routes in Next.js — keep them on Ecwid or migrate deliberately (see NEXTJS_HANDOFF.md do-not-overlap routes).
